title: Essen, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Essen, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Essen is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 583,000. The green heart of the Ruhr, transformed from coal and steel into a cultural and culinary destination with the UNESCO-listed Zollverein.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
